title: Design Search Autocomplete System
input_format: Partial user query string with prefix context
output_format: Top K relevant autocomplete suggestions sorted by weight/popularity
example_output: ['how to bake a cake', 'how to code in python', 'how to make coffee']
constraints: Must return results in < 100ms. Handle 10M+ unique queries/day. Support real-time updates of trending queries. Scalable to multi-region deployment.
function_signature: class AutocompleteSystem { getSuggestions(prefix: string): string[]; recordQuery(query: string): void; updateWeights(): void; }
